## Roslyn Type Inference & Overload Resolution Pipeline

All key files are under `src/Compilers/CSharp/Portable/Binder/Semantics/`:

| Class | File | Role |
|-------|------|------|
| `OverloadResolution` | `OverloadResolution/OverloadResolution.cs` | Main resolution entry points: `MethodInvocationOverloadResolution`, `ObjectCreationOverloadResolution`, `MethodOrPropertyOverloadResolution`, etc. Also contains `BetterFunctionMember` and `BetterConversionTarget` |
| `MethodTypeInferrer` | `OverloadResolution/MethodTypeInference.cs` | Generic type argument inference; static entry point `Infer(...)` |
| `BestTypeInferrer` | `BestTypeInferrer.cs` | Infers best common type for arrays (`InferBestType`) and conditional expressions (`InferBestTypeForConditionalOperator`) |
| `Conversions` | `Conversions/Conversions.cs` | C#-specific conversion classification, extends `ConversionsBase` |
| `ConversionsBase` | `Conversions/ConversionsBase.cs` | Core conversion logic including user-defined conversions |
| `TypeConversions` | `Conversions/TypeConversions.cs` | Type-only conversion queries |

The companion `OverloadResolution_ArgsToParameters.cs` handles argument-to-parameter mapping, and `OverloadResolutionResult.cs`/`MemberAnalysisResult.cs`/`MemberResolutionResult.cs` carry the resolution results.
